sources.note:
Searched for commercial (non-federal, non-GDIT) solutions-architect-consulting postings at Slalom, West Monroe, EPAM, Publicis Sapient, CGI, Perficient, and ePlus Technology, and cross-checked Levels.fyi per-level compensation breakdowns for the six previously-flagged self-reported companies (Slalom, Accenture, Deloitte, Capgemini, IBM, Cognizant).

New real, citable data points added (all base salary, all commercial/non-federal, all with published ranges):
1. Slalom, "MuleSoft Technical Architect - Enterprise" (Principal level), base $160,000-$232,000 depending on US market tier -- https://jo
